Section.Label: Chapter_`FGAbHomomorphism`_Section_`FGAbHomomorphism`
Section.Subsection:
Image, Images
Image and Images can be used directly even for a SubFGAb.

PreImage, PreImages
PreImage and PreImages only works for a SubFGAb, since the preimage of an element is not a FGAb but a additive coset, our method can't apply. However, PreImagesRepresentative is available.

ManSection.Label: `FGAbHomomorphism`
ManSection.Description: A and B are FGAb as domain and codomain. Let A be A_1\to A_0, and B be B_1\to B_0, m is a matrix representing a map A_0\to B_0. n is a matrix representing a map A_1\to B_1. n is actually determined by m up to a chain homotopy. Therefore, we don't need to give n explicitly.

ManSection.Returns: the underlying matirx A_0\to B_0 of a FGAbHomomorphism
the underlying matirx A_1\to B_1 of a FGAbHomomorphism

ManSection.Label: `FGAbKernel`
ManSection.Description:
FGAbKernel(f) is a FGAb equipped with FromFGAbKernel. The input of FromFGAbKernel must be a output of FGAbKernel.
You can use just Kernel(f) to get the same result as KernelOfAdditiveGeneralMapping(f). Kernel(f) has an attribute UnderlyingFGAbKernel(A) which is a output of FGAbKernel.
Kernel(f) is what you should use. Because Kernel(f) is actually a subset of Range(f), in particular, a SubFGAb. However, FGAbKernel(f) is just a FGAb equipped with a canonical map. FGAbKernel should be treated as an inner-built function, which is used to get kernel(f).

ManSection.Label: `FGAbCokernel`
ManSection.Description: FGAbKernel(f) is a FGAb equipped with ToFGAbCokernel. The input of FromFGAbCokernel must be a output of FGAbCokernel.

ManSection.Label: `FGAbPullback`

Oper.Name: FGAbPullback
Oper.Label: for IsFGAbHomomorphism and IsFGAbHomomorphismRep, IsFGAbHomomorphism and IsFGAbHomomorphismRep

ManSection.Description: FGAbPullback(f1, f2) is a FGAb equipped with FromFGAbPullback. FromFGAbPullback(A, n) is the projection to Source(f1) or Source(f2).

ManSection.Label: `FGAbPushout`

Oper.Name: FGAbPushout
Oper.Label: for IsFGAbHomomorphism and IsFGAbHomomorphismRep, IsFGAbHomomorphism and IsFGAbHomomorphismRep

ManSection.Description: FGAbPushout(f1, f2) is a FGAb equipped with ToFGAbPushout. ToFGAbPushout(A, n) is the projection to Range(f1) or Range(f2).
